privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Drupal Views landing page at /pro-audio filtering products with 'Pro' in title. The environment seeds 12 products from seed_products.php, including one 'Pro' product (Keychron Q1 Pro Mechanical Keyboard) and one negative test product (Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse). Expected header text is 'Upgrade your setup with our professional gear' (without period), menu title is 'Pro Audio', and the filter keyword is 'Pro'. Task description examples (AirPods Pro, Galaxy Buds2 Pro) are illustrative but not present in this environment's base catalog. Data is synthetically generated, not from public sources.
